Custom Yard Number Signs for Sports & Celebration Events

Support your child's jersey number before a big game or create memorable photo opportunities at graduation parties with our custom yard number signs. These durable outdoor number displays are perfect for sports events, birthday celebrations, anniversary parties, and family gatherings.

Our yard number signs are digitally printed on weather-resistant 4mm coroplast material and cut to an 18" height. Each number set includes all digits 0-9, allowing you to display any combination needed for your event. The lightweight yet durable construction makes these signs easy to install in yards, at sports fields, or event venues.

Choose from multiple decorative templates including sports themes, glitter effects, camo patterns, and celebration designs. Select your preferred font style to match your event's aesthetic. These outdoor number signs are UV-resistant and waterproof, ensuring your display looks great throughout your entire event.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Number Sign Material for Outdoor Sports & Event Use

These custom yard numbers are digitally printed in full color on premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material. This professional-grade substrate features hollow flutes similar to cardboard construction, providing exceptional durability while remaining lightweight for easy installation.

The 4mm coroplast material offers superior weather resistance, making it ideal for outdoor yard displays, sports events, and celebrations. Key material benefits include:

  • Waterproof construction - Withstands rain, moisture, and outdoor conditions
  • UV-resistant printing - Colors remain vibrant even with extended sun exposure
  • Lightweight design - Easy to transport and install in any yard or venue
  • Durable structure - Resists bending and maintains shape throughout events
  • Single or double-sided options - Choose the visibility level needed for your display

This premium coroplast material ensures your yard number display maintains its professional appearance from setup through the end of your event, whether it's a weekend sports game or week-long celebration.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Weather-Resistant Finishing for Yard Number Sign Installation

Each yard number sign is precision cut to 18" height with widths varying based on the specific numeral design. Our professional finishing process ensures clean edges and consistent sizing across your complete number set.

Finishing features for optimal outdoor performance:

  • Precision die-cutting - Clean, professional edges on every number
  • Full-color digital printing - Vibrant template designs and crisp font reproduction
  • UV-resistant coating - Protects against sun fading during outdoor events
  • Smooth surface finish - Easy to clean and maintain throughout use
  • Consistent thickness - 4mm profile provides stability for yard installation

The coroplast material's natural flexibility allows for secure installation using stakes, stands, or temporary mounting systems while maintaining durability for multiple events and celebrations.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Yard Number Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production timelines to accommodate your sports events, celebrations, and party planning needs. Choose from four production speed options ranging from rush delivery to cost-effective standard timing.

1 Business Day Priority

Perfect for last-minute events and urgent celebrations. Your custom yard numbers will be printed and ready for shipment within one business day.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day service available - contact customer service
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping
  • Production starts when artwork upload is complete and approved

2 Business Days Express

Ideal balance of speed and reliability for planned sports events and celebrations.

  • Professional quality printing with express turnaround
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Same-day emergency service available upon request
  • Production begins after complete file upload and approval

3 Business Days Standard

Our most popular production option - free fast turnaround for most custom yard number orders.

  • Excellent for planned events with standard timing needs
  • Full quality control and professional finishing
  • Late orders process the following business day
  • Ideal for birthday parties, graduations, and sports seasons

5 Business Days Saver

Cost-effective option for events planned well in advance.

  • Budget-friendly production timeline
  • Same professional quality and materials
  • Perfect for recurring events and advance planning
  • All production policies apply

Yard Number Sign Payment & Ordering Options

We accept all major payment methods to make ordering your custom yard numbers convenient and secure. Our streamlined checkout process ensures fast order processing for your sports events and celebrations.

Accepted Payment Methods

Secure Ordering Process

Shipping Options for Yard Number Sign Delivery

Fast, reliable shipping ensures your custom yard numbers arrive in time for sports events, parties, and celebrations. We offer multiple shipping speeds to match your event timeline and budget.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Overnight Express - Next business day delivery for urgent events
  • 2-Day Priority - Fast delivery for planned celebrations
  • Ground Standard - Cost-effective shipping for advance orders
  • Local Pickup - Available at our facility for nearby customers

Shipping Guidelines

  • Yard number sets ship flat in protective packaging
  • Tracking information provided for all orders
  • Residential and commercial addresses accepted
  • Signature confirmation available upon request
  • Special handling for large quantity team orders

Delivery Timing

Total delivery time combines production time plus shipping transit. For example, 1-day production + overnight shipping = 2 days total from order approval to delivery.

Rural areas and Alaska/Hawaii may require additional transit time. Contact customer service for specific delivery estimates to your event location.

Sports & Celebration Uses for Custom Yard Numbers

Custom yard number signs create memorable displays for a wide variety of outdoor events and celebrations. These versatile number sets enhance any occasion where you want to highlight important digits.

Sports Events & Team Support

  • Youth Sports - Display player jersey numbers at games and tournaments
  • Senior Night - Honor graduating athletes with yard number displays
  • Team Parties - Create photo opportunities with championship years
  • Sports Banquets - Showcase record-breaking statistics and achievements
  • Recruiting Events - Highlight prospect numbers for college visits

Birthday & Anniversary Celebrations

  • Milestone Birthdays - 16th, 18th, 21st, 50th birthday yard displays
  • Anniversary Years - Wedding anniversaries and relationship milestones
  • Sweet Sixteen Parties - Large yard numbers for party entrances
  • Graduation Events - Class years and graduation dates

Business & Community Events

  • Grand Openings - Business anniversary years and opening dates
  • School Events - Class reunions and homecoming celebrations
  • Fundraising Events - Goal amounts and achievement displays
  • Community Festivals - Event years and commemorative dates

The weather-resistant construction makes these yard numbers perfect for both indoor and outdoor venues, ensuring your celebration display looks professional throughout your entire event.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Yard Number Signs

What material are yard number signs printed on?

Our yard number signs are digitally printed on 4mm corrugated plastic (coroplast) material. This waterproof, UV-resistant substrate is specifically designed for outdoor use and provides excellent durability while remaining lightweight for easy installation.

Are yard number signs waterproof for outdoor use?

Yes, these number signs are completely waterproof and weather-resistant. The coroplast material and UV-resistant inks ensure your yard numbers maintain their appearance throughout outdoor sports events, celebrations, and extended display periods.

Can I order yard numbers in full color?

Absolutely! All yard number signs are printed in full color using professional digital printing. Choose from over 20 colorful template designs including sports themes, glitter effects, patterns, and celebration styles to match your event.

What font styles are available for yard numbers?

We offer three professional font options: Capucine Basic Italic (elegant script style), Helvetica Neue Lt 85 Heavy (bold modern font), and Urbane Rounded Heavy (friendly rounded numbers). Each font is optimized for visibility and professional appearance.

How do I customize individual yard number signs?

Simply select your preferred template design and font style during the ordering process. Each order includes a complete set of numbers 0-9, allowing you to display any combination needed for your event. No additional design work is required.

What are the dimensions of yard number signs?

All yard number signs are cut to 18" height for optimal visibility. The width varies depending on the specific numeral (for example, "1" is narrower than "8"). The consistent 18" height ensures uniform appearance when displaying multiple numbers together.
